traits.title: Traits
description: Character traits are abilities that are not tied to your race or class. They can enhance your skills, racial abilities, class abilities, or other statistics, allowing you further customization.
[Go here](rule/traits) for more information on traits.
::main[View all Traits and Drawbacks]{to=main/traits_all endem="(1,970 traits)"}

traits_all.title: All Traits
description: Character traits are abilities that are not tied to your race or class. They can enhance your skills, racial abilities, class abilities, or other statistics, allowing you further customization.

The @HL[Campaign] column indicates which published AP the trait was designed for. The @HL[Creature] column lists any race or creature type prerequisites. @HL[Region] shows the region the trait is restricted to. @HL[Faith] indicates which religion grants that trait. @HL[Group] shows which faction or organization grants that trait. @HL[Alignment] lists any alignment prerequisites for a trait. @HL[Other] lists any other prerequisites.
The @HL[Benefit] column will give a brief description of the trait's benefits. It may use the following abbreviations:
| att/dmg | attack rolls and damage rolls |
| Circ: *benefit* | *Benefit* only applies in specific circumstances |
| CS: *skill* | Gain *skill* as a class skill |
| Prof(weapon) | Grants proficiency in the specified weapon |
| Prq: *benefit* | Gain *benefit* only if you meet a prerequisite |
| VCirc: *benefit* | *Benefit* only applies in **very specific** circumstances |
